## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request contains one coherent change.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where appropriate.
- [ ] Relevant tests and builds pass; any limitation is reported above.
- [ ] No secrets or credentials were added.
- [ ] No production endpoint, application ID, signing configuration, `versionCode`, or `versionName` changed unless explicitly intended and documented.
- [ ] No release or tag was created unless explicitly requested.
- [ ] User-visible changes were manually checked.
- [ ] Data migration, synchronization, deletion, and offline failure paths were considered where relevant.
